subject: fix(theme): ThemeSelector accessibility + stale docs + theme registration
body:
ThemeSelector.jsx rewritten with proper accessibility:
- ARIA: aria-expanded, aria-controls, aria-label on trigger, useId()
- Focus: auto-focus first item on open, restore to trigger on close
- Keyboard: ArrowUp/Down, Home/End navigate items, Escape closes
- Focus rings: focus-visible:ring-2 on all interactive elements
- Touch targets: min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] on buttons
- overscroll-contain on scrollable list

index.css: Added nord and night back to @plugin directive — they were
defined in daisyuiThemes.js catalog but missing from CSS registration.
Users who select them would get unstyled pages.

Documentation fixes:
- CLAUDE.md: defaults nord/night → lofi/black, mobile header description
- HISTORY.md: defaults reference corrected
- STYLE_GUIDE.md: defaults, old hex values, dark mode section, quick
  reference class combos all updated for DaisyUI tokens
- README.md: tech stack updated to TW4 + DaisyUI 5

Tags: accessibility, theme, docs, daisyui, a11y
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
